stages.concept:
# Unit 038: 현재시제 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **현재시제**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I **go** to school every day.
> 나는 매일 학교에 간다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 현재시제는 **현재의 상태**, **반복적인 습관**, 또는 **일반적인 사실/진리**를 나타낼 때 사용해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **현재의 상태**를 나타낼 때:

> I **am** a student.
> 나는 학생이다.

> She **has** a cute dog.
> 그녀는 귀여운 개를 가지고 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **반복적인 습관**을 나타낼 때:

> I **go** to school every day.
> 나는 매일 학교에 간다.

> He **plays** soccer after school.
> 그는 방과 후에 축구를 한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **일반적인 사실이나 진리**를 나타낼 때:

> The sun **rises** in the east.
> 태양은 동쪽에서 뜬다.

> Water **boils** at 100 degrees.
> 물은 100도에서 끓는다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 현재시제와 자주 쓰이는 시간 부사(구)가 있어요:

> every day(매일), always(항상), usually(보통), often(자주), sometimes(때때로)

🧑‍🎓 학생: 현재시제는 현재 상태, 반복 습관, 일반적 사실을 나타내는 거군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 038: 빈도부사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 빈도부사가 들어갈 위치를 고르시오.
never
I ① will ② speak ③ to ④ him again.
> **정답** 2

---

**02.** 다음 빈도부사가 들어갈 위치를 고르시오.
usually
She ① is ② calm ③ in ④ class.
> **정답** 2

---

**03.** 다음 빈도부사가 들어갈 위치를 고르시오.
sometimes
① My grandfather ② forgets ③ his keys ④.
> **정답** 2

---

**04.** 다음 빈도부사가 들어갈 위치를 고르시오.
seldom
He ① eats ② sweet ③ snacks ④.
> **정답** 1

---

**05.** 다음 빈도부사가 들어갈 위치를 고르시오.
always
She ① is ② polite ③ to ④ everyone.
> **정답** 2

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She goes always to the library after school.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** goes always → always goes

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
They usually are tired after practice.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** usually are → are usually

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He never is late for class.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** never is → is never

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I drink often water before bed.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** drink often → often drink

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She reads seldom comic books.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** reads seldom → seldom reads

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 항상 아침을 먹는다.
I eat breakfast.
> **정답** always

---

**12.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 보통 7시에 일어난다.
She gets up at 7.
> **정답** usually

---

**13.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 가끔 농구를 한다.
He plays basketball.
> **정답** sometimes

---

**14.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 결코 거짓말을 하지 않는다.
I tell a lie.
> **정답** never

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그들은 자주 공원에서 산책한다.
They take a walk in the park.
> **정답** often

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 항상 친절하다.
always kind She is
> **정답** She / is / always / kind

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 보통 발표를 잘 한다.
well the presentation He is usually prepared for
> **정답** He / is / usually / well / prepared / for / the / presentation

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 가끔 지하철에서 우산을 놓고 내린다.
in the subway leave umbrella sometimes my I
> **정답** I / sometimes / leave / my / umbrella / in / the / subway

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 보통 매우 조심스럽다.
is very She usually careful.
> **정답** She / is / usually / very / careful.

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
우리는 항상 이 카페에서 만날 수 있을까요?
meet Can we always at this cafe (     )
> **정답** Can / we / always / meet / at / this / cafe / ?
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 038: 빈도부사 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom _______________ does well on math exams,
so he _____________ gets awards at school.
seldom - usually
always - seldom
usually - often
never - sometimes
> **정답** usually - often

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy ______________ goes to bed before the
midnight, so she _______________ feels sleepy in the
daytime.
often - always
always - usually
usually - never
never - seldom
> **정답** usually - never

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
My mom and dad are very different. My dad
___________ eats rice every meal, but my mom
___________ eats it.
often - always
always - seldom
sometimes - often
usually - sometimes
> **정답** always - seldom

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Amy often goes shopping, and she spends a
lot of money.
A lady seldom eats dinner, so she is a little bit
fat.
The girl is very lazy. She always misses the
school bus.
Tom never fights with his friends, so they
like him.
> **정답** A lady seldom eats dinner, so she is a little bit fat.

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Jake is usually busy with work, so he
returns home at night.
Tom seldom sleeps well at night, so his eyes
are red.
I don't always believe news, because it may be
wrong.
She never lied to me, so I am angry with her.
> **정답** She never lied to me, so I am angry with her.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 괄호에서 적당한 말을
고르시오.
Tom은 실수를 거의 하지 않는다.
Tom (     ) makes mistakes.
> **정답** seldom

---

**07.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 괄호에서 적당한 말을
고르시오.
Amy는 자주 그녀의 강아지를 산책시킨다.
Amy (     ) walks her dog.
> **정답** often

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Tom always plays the guitar after school.
The police never missed bad guys.
My computer often stops working and goes
blank.
My brother sometimes is talking too loud.
> **정답** My brother sometimes is talking too loud.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
The clever students usually finish their
homework fast.
The TV show always ends with happy stories.
My dad often reads newspaper in the evening.
Amy is lazy, so she washes the dishes
seldom after meals.
> **정답** Amy is lazy, so she washes the dishes seldom after meals.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Emma는 항상 배고픔을 느끼지만 좀처럼 뭔가를 먹지는 않는다.
Emma always feels hungry, but doesn't seldom
eat anything.
Emma feels always hungry, but seldom eats
anything.
Emma always feels hungry, but seldom eats
anything.
Emma feels always hungry, but seldom doesn't
eat anything.
> **정답** Emma always feels hungry, but seldom eats anything.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
엄마는 요리할 때 항상 시간을 확인한다.
My mom checks always the time when she
cooks.
My mom always checks the time when she
cooks.
My mom seldom checks the time when she
cooks.
My mom often checks the time when she
cooks.
> **정답** My mom always checks the time when she cooks.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
장마철에 날씨는 보통 나쁘다.
The weather usually is bad in rainy season.
The weather is always bad in rainy season.
The weather is often bad in rainy season.
The weather is usually bad in rainy season.
> **정답** The weather is usually bad in rainy season.

---

**13.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
I never exercise, so my health is good.
My tablet often doesn't work well, because it
was a cheap one.
He always pays for everyone, because he
doesn't have any money.
It never happened before, so I saw it for the
first time.
> **정답** I never exercise, so my health is good., He always pays for everyone, because he doesn't have any money.

---

**14.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
I usually forget to turn off the light, so my
mom is angry.
They are very different, so they often fight
over small things.
My sister always eats sweet things, so she
doesn't go to a dentist.
Amy often eats meat, because she's a
vegetarian.
> **정답** My sister always eats sweet things, so she doesn't go to a dentist., Amy often eats meat, because she's a vegetarian.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom takes a shower sometimes in cold
water.
Jake goes often to a market to buy some
fresh vegetable.
Amy never calls her friends on weekends.
Lisa usually is upset about her grades.
> **정답** Amy never calls her friends on weekends.

---

**16.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom usually has curry rice for dinner.
The workers take often some rest.
Amy makes never mistakes when she speaks
in English.
Jake often was thirsty after exercising.
> **정답** Tom usually has curry rice for dinner.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom always is singing in the
shower.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** always is → is always

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Amy makes often spelling
mistakes.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** makes often → often makes

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
We often will practice playing
basketball.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** often will → will often

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I thought never he was smart.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** thought never → never thought
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 038 빈도부사중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 그림을 보고, 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
![그림](public/images/units/032_desc_01.webp)
그는 항상 아침에 샤워한다.
힌트 (     ) take a shower
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in the morning.
정답 always, takes, a, shower

---

**02.** 그림을 보고, 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
![그림](public/images/units/032_desc_02.webp)
그는 가끔 그의 엄마를 돕는다.
힌트 (     ) help, his mom
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 sometimes, helps, his, mom

---

**03.** 그림을 보고, 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
![그림](public/images/units/032_desc_01.webp)
Tom과 Amy는 자주 통화한다.
힌트 (     ) talk on the phone
Tom and Amy  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 often, talk, on, the, phone

---

**04.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
seldom, visit
A: How often do you visit your grandma?
B: I  (     )   (     )  her.
정답 seldom, visit

---

**05.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
never, be late
A: Is the new worker sometimes late to work?
B: No, he  (     )   (     )   (     )  to work.
정답 is, never, late

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
usually, use
A: Does he seldom use cash?
B: Yes, he rarely uses cash. He  (     )   (     )  his
credit card.
정답 usually, uses

---

**07.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
My sister usually is using my laptop when I am not
home.
→ My sister 
when I am not home.
정답 is usually using my laptop

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
Lisa worries usually about her future.
→ Lisa  (     ) .
정답 usually worries about her future

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
~~~
Amy eats vegetables but never she eats fruits.
→ Amy eats vegetables but
.
정답 she never eats fruits

---

**10.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
We sometimes will go to the movies together.
→We  (     )  together.
정답 will sometimes go to the movies

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 038: 빈도부사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Mina _______________ does well on English exams, so she _____________ gets praise at school.
seldom - usually always - seldom usually - often never - sometimes
> 정답: usually - often

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Jake ______________ goes to bed before midnight, so he _______________ feels tired in the morning.
often - always always - usually usually - never never - seldom
> 정답: usually - never

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My brother and I are very different.
My brother ___________ drinks juice every morning, but I ___________ drink it.
often - always always - seldom sometimes - often usually - sometimes
> 정답: always - seldom

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Amy often goes to the bookstore, and she buys a lot of books.
A boy seldom eats lunch, so he is a little bit heavy.
The student is very lazy.
She always forgets her homework.
Jake never argues with his friends, so they like him.
> 정답: A boy seldom eats lunch, so he is a little bit heavy.

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Sora is usually busy with homework, so she goes to bed at night.
Tom seldom sleeps well at night, so his eyes are tired.
I don't always trust stories, because they may be wrong.
She never helped me, so I am thankful to her.
> 정답: She never helped me, so I am thankful to her.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 괄호에서 적당한 말을 고르시오.
미나는 실수를 거의 하지 않는다.
Mina ? makes mistakes.
> 정답: seldom

---

**07.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 괄호에서 적당한 말을 고르시오.
지수는 자주 그녀의 고양이 나비를 돌본다.
Jisoo ? takes care of her cat, Nabi.
> 정답: often

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Jake always reads books after school.
The police never missed bad people.
My tablet often stops working and goes dark.
My sister sometimes is singing too loud.
> 정답: My sister sometimes is singing too loud.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
The smart students usually finish their homework quickly.
The cartoon always ends with happy stories.
My mom often reads magazines in the evening.
Kevin is lazy, so he cleans his room seldom on weekends.
> 정답: Kevin is lazy, so he cleans his room seldom on meals.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Lisa는 항상 졸리지만 좀처럼 낮잠을 자지는 않는다.
Lisa always feels sleepy, but doesn't seldom take a nap.
Lisa feels always sleepy, but seldom takes a nap.
Lisa always feels sleepy, but seldom takes a nap.
Lisa feels always sleepy, but seldom doesn't take a nap.
> 정답: Lisa always feels sleepy, but seldom takes a nap.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
아빠는 요리할 때 항상 시간을 확인한다.
My dad checks always the time when he cooks.
My dad always checks the time when he cooks.
My dad seldom checks the time when he cooks.
My dad often checks the time when he cooks.
> 정답: My dad always checks the time when he cooks.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
겨울에 날씨는 보통 춥다.
The weather usually is cold in winter.
The weather is always cold in winter.
The weather is often cold in winter.
The weather is usually cold in winter.
> 정답: The weather is usually cold in winter.

---

**13.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Ben takes a walk sometimes in the rain.
Amy goes often to a shop to buy some snacks.
Tom never calls his parents on weekdays.
Sora usually is happy about her results.
> 정답: Tom never calls his parents on weekdays.

**16.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Mina usually has pasta for lunch.
The players take often a break.
Kevin makes never mistakes when he plays the piano.
Jake often was hungry after running.
> 정답: Mina usually has pasta for lunch.
